task_name: Missing-period clarification at createBoard (board stays pending)

strengths: detectReportPeriod is cleanly separated from classifyIntent as an injected mockable dep
Conservative fallback in llm.ts:555 defaults to hasPeriod:false on parse failure
createBoard correctly only modifies explanation without triggering any pipeline
sendMessage fold-in mutates only original_intent, mirrors confirmRegenerateBoard precedent
sendMessage fold-in returns early before generateClarificationQuestion, avoiding redundant LLM call
All 4 test cases cover the DELIVERABLE GWT scenarios including the derived fold-in
Pipeline never triggered while board is pending — consistent with existing approve-only trigger pattern

issues.description: Default clarification question string "Which time period should this status report cover?" is duplicated in llm.ts:555 fallback, service.ts:367 fallback, and llm.ts:DETECT_PERIOD_SYSTEM_PROMPT. Should be a shared constant to avoid drift.

Commit 26cb0a8 includes fetchCardTimestamps/fetchActivityEvents changes in routes.ts (473-510) and service.ts (AgentBoardServiceDeps + runPipeline query_board_data block) that belong to T2 scope, not T5. Functionally harmless but conflates task boundaries.
